---
title: "Variance Wrapped 2025 Talent Report"
author: "Jonathon Sun"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    theme: united
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    pdf-engine: xelatex
params:
  talent: "Leia Memoria【Variance Project】"
  data_source: "datalake"
  data_root: null
  title_classifications_path: null
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Executive Summary

# Introduction

This report summarizes publishing activity and performance for **`r params$talent`**.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

find_variance_repo_root <- function(start = getwd()) {
  env_root <- trimws(Sys.getenv("TALENT_REPO_ROOT", unset = ""))
  if (nzchar(env_root)) {
    return(normalizePath(env_root, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  }

  candidate <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  repeat {
    if (file.exists(file.path(candidate, "AGENTS.md")) &&
        dir.exists(file.path(candidate, "r_scripts"))) {
      return(candidate)
    }
    parent <- dirname(candidate)
    if (identical(parent, candidate)) {
      break
    }
    candidate <- parent
  }

  stop("Could not locate the repository root. Set TALENT_REPO_ROOT.")
}

repo_root <- find_variance_repo_root()

knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.align = "center")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = repo_root)

if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
  knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    fig.width = 14,
    fig.height = 7,
    out.width = "0.8\\linewidth"
  )
} else {
  knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    fig.width = 10,
    fig.height = 5
  )
}

required_packages <- c(
  "dplyr",
  "kableExtra",
  "lubridate",
  "purrr",
  "readr",
  "stringr"
)
missing_packages <- required_packages[
  !vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
]
if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required R packages: ",
    paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "),
    ". Install them in the project renv library before rendering."
  )
}

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(kableExtra)
  library(lubridate)
  library(stringr)
})

source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "repo_env.R"))
load_repo_env(repo_root)
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "datalake_root.r"))
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "staging_root.R"))
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "talent_select.R"))
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "import_data", "talent_files.R"))
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "clean_data", "CleanData.R"))

resolve_variance_data_root <- function(data_source, data_root = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(data_root) && length(data_root) > 0 &&
      !is.na(data_root[[1]]) && nzchar(trimws(as.character(data_root[[1]])))) {
    return(normalizePath(data_root[[1]], winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  }

  data_source <- match.arg(tolower(data_source), c("datalake", "staging"))
  root <- if (identical(data_source, "datalake")) {
    get_datalake_root()
  } else {
    get_staging_root()
  }
  normalizePath(root, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

optional_param_path <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || is.na(x[[1]]) ||
      !nzchar(trimws(as.character(x[[1]])))) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  normalizePath(x[[1]], winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

latest_talent_snapshot_path <- function(talent_path, snapshot_type) {
  snapshot_paths <- list_talent_snapshot_files(talent_path)
  if (length(snapshot_paths) == 0) {
    stop("No CSV snapshots found for talent: ", basename(talent_path))
  }

  snapshot_types <- vapply(
    snapshot_paths,
    infer_snapshot_type_key,
    character(1)
  )
  candidates <- snapshot_paths[snapshot_types == snapshot_type]
  if (length(candidates) == 0) {
    stop(
      "No `", snapshot_type, "` snapshots found for talent: ",
      basename(talent_path)
    )
  }

  snapshot_dates <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(
    stringr::str_extract(basename(candidates), "\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}")
  ))
  modification_times <- file.info(candidates)$mtime
  newest_first <- order(
    snapshot_dates,
    modification_times,
    basename(candidates),
    decreasing = TRUE,
    na.last = TRUE
  )

  candidates[[newest_first[[1]]]]
}

talent <- params$talent
data_root <- resolve_variance_data_root(params$data_source, params$data_root)
talent_path <- select_talent(talent, root = data_root)
talent_folder <- basename(talent_path)
analytics_snapshot_path <- latest_talent_snapshot_path(
  talent_path,
  snapshot_type = "video_analytics"
)

# This report needs one current, video-level snapshot. Loading the entire talent
# directory would bind hundreds of historical files across unrelated data types.
talent_files <- TalentFiles(list(analytics_snapshot_path))

title_classifications <- load_title_classifications(
  path = optional_param_path(params$title_classifications_path),
  talent = talent_folder
)

df <- video_analytics_prep_with_titles(
  files = talent_files,
  titles = title_classifications,
  talent = talent_folder
) %>%
  dedupe_latest_rows(key_cols = "Video ID")

# Compatibility mappings from the current title-classification schema to the
# concepts used in the original Variance Wrapped report.
if (!("topic" %in% names(df))) {
  df$topic <- "Unclassified"
}
df$topic <- dplyr::coalesce(na_if(trimws(as.character(df$topic)), ""), "Unclassified")

if (!("primary_reference" %in% names(df))) {
  df$primary_reference <- NA_character_
}
if (!("tags" %in% names(df))) {
  df$tags <- NA_character_
}
df$content_reference <- dplyr::coalesce(
  na_if(trimws(as.character(df$primary_reference)), ""),
  na_if(trimws(as.character(df$tags)), ""),
  "No reference"
)

if (!("collaborative_energy" %in% names(df))) {
  df$collaborative_energy <- FALSE
}
df$is_collab <- !is.na(df$collaborative_energy) & df$collaborative_energy

summarize_analytics <- function(analytics_df, fallback_talent) {
  channel_names <- analytics_df$`Channel Name`
  channel_names <- channel_names[!is.na(channel_names) & nzchar(channel_names)]
  talent_name <- if (length(channel_names) > 0) channel_names[[1]] else fallback_talent
  total_hours <- sum(analytics_df$duration_seconds, na.rm = TRUE) / 3600

  tibble::tibble(
    Talent = talent_name,
    Statistic = c("Total Streamed Hours", "Total Streamed Days", "Total Views"),
    Value = c(
      total_hours,
      total_hours / 24,
      sum(analytics_df$views, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  )
}
```


# Summary Analytics

```{r}
#| label: summary-analytics

summary_df <- summarize_analytics(df, talent_folder)

summary_df %>%
  kableExtra::kbl(
    format = "html",
    caption = "Summary Analytics",
    col.names = c("Talent", "Metric", "Value"),
    digits = 1
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
```


# Content Frequency by Month

```{r}
#| label: content-frequency-month

month_summary <- df %>%
  dplyr::count(.data$publish_month, name = "ContentReleases") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$ContentReleases))

month_summary %>%
  kableExtra::kbl(
    format = "html",
    caption = "Content Frequency by Month",
    col.names = c("Month", "Content Releases")
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
```


# Content Release Day Frequency

```{r}
#| label: content-frequency-weekday

weekday_summary <- df %>%
  dplyr::count(.data$publish_wday, name = "ContentReleases") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$ContentReleases))

weekday_summary %>%
  kableExtra::kbl(
    format = "html",
    caption = "Content Frequency by Day of Week",
    col.names = c("Day of Week", "Content Releases")
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
```


# Content by Topic

```{r}
#| label: content-frequency-topic

topic_summary <- df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(.data$topic) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    TotalCounts = dplyr::n(),
    TotalSecondsStreamed = sum(.data$duration_seconds, na.rm = TRUE),
    TotalSubsGained = sum(.data$subscribersGained, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TotalMinutesStreamed = .data$TotalSecondsStreamed / 60,
    TotalHoursStreamed = .data$TotalMinutesStreamed / 60
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$TotalHoursStreamed))

topic_summary %>%
  dplyr::mutate(TotalHoursStreamed = round(.data$TotalHoursStreamed, 1)) %>%
  kableExtra::kbl(
    format = "html",
    caption = "Content by Classified Topic",
    col.names = c(
      "Topic",
      "Videos / Streams",
      "Seconds Streamed",
      "Subscribers Gained",
      "Minutes Streamed",
      "Hours Streamed"
    )
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
```


## With Included Reference

```{r}
#| label: content-frequency-reference

reference_summary <- df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    content_reference = stringr::str_remove(.data$content_reference, "\\s*pt\\.\\d+$")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(.data$topic, .data$content_reference) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    TotalCounts = dplyr::n(),
    TotalSecondsStreamed = sum(.data$duration_seconds, na.rm = TRUE),
    TotalSubsGained = sum(.data$subscribersGained, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TotalMinutesStreamed = .data$TotalSecondsStreamed / 60,
    TotalHoursStreamed = .data$TotalMinutesStreamed / 60
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$TotalHoursStreamed))

reference_summary %>%
  dplyr::mutate(TotalHoursStreamed = round(.data$TotalHoursStreamed, 1)) %>%
  kableExtra::kbl(
    format = "html",
    caption = "Content Summary by Topic and Reference",
    col.names = c(
      "Topic",
      "Reference / Tags",
      "Videos / Streams",
      "Seconds Streamed",
      "Subscribers Gained",
      "Minutes Streamed",
      "Hours Streamed"
    )
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
```


# Total Collaborations

```{r}
#| label: content-frequency-collaborations

collaboration_summary <- df %>%
  dplyr::count(.data$publish_month, .data$is_collab, name = "Count") %>%
  dplyr::filter(.data$is_collab)

collaboration_summary %>%
  kableExtra::kbl(
    format = "html",
    caption = "Total Collaborations by Month",
    col.names = c("Month", "Is Collaboration", "Count")
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
```
